plan_details.title: Unlimited Talk & Text
plan_details.content: This plan offers unlimited voice calling and text messaging across the country with low monthly fees. It is ideal for customers who communicate frequently and need steady connectivity without data usage concerns.

plan_details.title: Premium Data Booster
plan_details.content: The Premium Data Booster adds a high-capacity data allowance to an existing service plan. It is designed for high-bandwidth users streaming video, video conferencing, and using mobile hotspots.

plan_details.title: Family Share Bundle
plan_details.content: Family Share Bundle lets up to five lines share a common pool of voice minutes, texts, and data. It includes parental controls, shared data alerts, and cost management tools to keep family telecom spend predictable.

plan_details.title: International Roaming Pack
plan_details.content: This pack provides reduced roaming fees, international calling minutes, and local data access in multiple countries. It is best for business travelers or frequent international visitors needing consistent service abroad.

plan_details.title: IoT Device Connectivity
plan_details.content: IoT Device Connectivity supports sensor networks, smart meters, and industrial IoT devices with optimized low-power data plans. It focuses on reliability, device management, and secure network access for machine-to-machine communication.

quiz_questions.question: Which plan is best for a family that wants to share voice, text, and data across multiple lines?
quiz_questions.explanation: Family Share Bundle is designed for up to five lines to share voice, text, and data, making it the best option for families.

quiz_questions.question: A customer needs mobile hotspot support and large monthly data for video conferences. Which plan should they choose?
quiz_questions.explanation: Premium Data Booster provides a high-capacity data allowance suitable for mobile hotspots and video conferencing.

quiz_questions.question: What plan is optimized for sensor networks and low-power device communication?
quiz_questions.explanation: IoT Device Connectivity is tailored for IoT devices, focusing on low-power data plans and machine-to-machine communication.

quiz_questions.question: Which plan should a frequent international traveler pick for reduced roaming fees and local data access abroad?
quiz_questions.explanation: International Roaming Pack offers reduced roaming fees and local data access for travelers abroad.

quiz_questions.question: If a subscriber mainly needs unlimited voice and text but no extra data, which plan is most appropriate?
quiz_questions.explanation: Unlimited Talk & Text focuses on unlimited voice calling and messaging, making it ideal for users who do not need additional data.
